gems.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP重启，怀旧与燃情并存，却因套路化而被低估。
gems.whyWatchEn: A nostalgic and passionate reboot of a classic IP, unfairly overlooked due to its formulaic plot.
gems.audience: 喜欢《希曼》老粉丝、奇幻动作片爱好者、怀旧向观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of the original He-Man, fantasy action lovers, and nostalgic viewers.

gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.whyWatch: 声音里的浪漫，误打误撞的深情，年度最被忽视的治愈系爱情小品。
gems.whyWatchEn: A romance built on voicemails and serendipity—the year's most overlooked heartwarming gem.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温情爱情片、轻松喜剧爱好者、寻找治愈故事的人。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm romantic comedies like Love Actually, and viewers seeking a feel-good story.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.whyWatch: 皮克斯再探玩具情感深度，数字时代下的童年变迁，远超普通续集。
gems.whyWatchEn: Pixar deepens the emotional core of toys in the digital age—far more than just another sequel.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列粉丝、家庭观众、关注儿童成长与科技影响的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Toy Story fans, family audiences, and parents concerned about kids' screen time.
